name: I missed work due to work illness but employer is mad, is that retaliation?
description: Yes illegal; report to Utah Labor Commission.[9]

mainEntity.name: I missed work due to work illness but employer is mad, is that retaliation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes illegal; report to Utah Labor Commission.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah prohibits retaliation for filing comp claims.[9] Protected activity includes reporting illnesses.[1] Key factors: Timing of discipline, performance records. File UALD complaint within 180 days; lawyer assesses wrongful termination too.
